data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Implement real-time monitoring to identify potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Use AI-driven analytics tools for behavior monitoring.

data.title: Data Encryption Protocols
data.description: Protect data at rest and in transit using strong encryption standards.
data.technical_spec: Utilize AES-256 for encryption; ensure SSL/TLS across communications.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Authenticate every interaction within the network to prevent breaches.
data.technical_spec: Implement identity and access management tools like Okta.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conduct frequent security assessments to find and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Schedule biannual penetration testing and code reviews.

data.title: Secure DevOps Practices
data.description: Integrate security throughout the development lifecycle.
data.technical_spec: Adopt DevSecOps principles with automated CI/CD pipelines.
